game.color_memory.controls: [1]/[2]/[3]/[4] Input Color [Enter] Submit [Backspace]/[Delete] Delete Last Input [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.color_memory.description: Carefully observe the color sequence randomly shown by the system, then repeat it correctly in order.
game.color_memory.details:
f%Each round, the system randomly selects {tc:yellow}a number of colors equal to the round number{tc:clear}. The player must reproduce them after viewing.
{tc:red}Each round's selection is independent; previous rounds do not affect the current one.{tc:clear}

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[1]/[2]/[3]/[4]{tc:clear} Input color (Red / Yellow / Blue / Green)
{tc:light_cyan}[Enter]{tc:clear} Submit
{tc:light_cyan}[Backspace]/[Delete]{tc:clear} Delete last input
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.color_memory.name: Color Memory
warning.back_to_game_list_hint: Press ESC / Q to return to the game list
warning.enlarge_hint: Please enlarge the terminal window to continue.
